text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm out shopping, I see Biko Pegasus
patrolling the district... with Shinko Windy
secretly trailing behind her.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Ya really wanna know what my plan is? All
right, you've backed me into a corner, so I'll tell
ya!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna steal all the glory of Biko's patrol! I call
it... Operation: Justice Extermination!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
She's so full of herself! I asked her to play tag, but
she turned me down to do this stupid patrol!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I even tried waiting till she was done to ask again,
but she just went back to her dorm...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
So this is my plan! If anything bad happens, I'll
swoop in and save the day first so she won't be
able to—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
See you later, granny! Take care to watch your
step now!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Biko! Did you just help someone?! I was
supposed to do that and get all the glory!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Glory? Oh, are you offering to help? Thanks!
There's always so much happening around here
that I'll take all the help I can get!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
You got it all wrong! I'm not offering to help!
Ugh, why would you even ask me to do something
so draining?
choice_data_list: Come on, help lessen her burden.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I have no idea what you're talking about!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The truth? Is there something you want to say to
me? It's okay! Lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Nngh... Nnnngh... No! Just shut up! I hate all of
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shinko Windy turns beet-red and blurts out her
words hastily before sprinting away as fast as she
can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I point out that Biko Pegasus might be declining
her offers to play tag because she's too tired from
her patrols.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
If I help her, does that mean she'll still have
enough energy to play tag with me after she's
done?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
F-fine! I'll help out! You'd better be grateful,
Biko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So the pair patrol together... and peace once
again prevails in the shopping district.
